response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video, identifying two songs. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' by マイキP (Maiki-P) based on on-screen text, performed by Hakos Baelz and others. Searched for and retrieved the lyrics. 3. Identified Song 2 as 'V' by Gohgo, Soma Genda, pw.a based on on-screen text, performed by Hakos Baelz. Searched for and retrieved the lyrics. 4. Constructed the JSON object with two scenes, providing full lyrics for both songs.
response.global_summary: A 3D video performance featuring VTubers performing two songs: 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' and 'V'.

scenes.description: VTubers perform 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' on a 3D stage with colorful lighting. Text on screen indicates 'Lyrics, Music: マイキP'.
scenes.song_title: サイバーパンクデッドボーイ (Cyberpunk Dead Boy)
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakos Baelz, Kobo Kanaeru, et al.
